confirmed_behavior.expected: Checkout should be disabled or should display an error when the cart is empty, and no order should be created or charged.
confirmed_behavior.observed: With the cart showing 'Your cart is empty.', clicking the Checkout button creates an order (e.g., 'Order ord_db6cc37d') and displays 'Total charged: $12.50'.

reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Ensure the Cart panel shows 'Your cart is empty.'
Observe that an order card appears with an order ID and a non-zero 'Total charged' despite no items in the cart.
title: Checkout succeeds and charges even when cart is empty
